market_context:

Median nightly rate: £175.00

title_variants: Modern 2BR on Queen St – Sleeps 4, City‑Center
City Break Stay: Queen St Apartment for 4 Guests
Queen St Flat – Ideal for Couples & Families
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your modern retreat on Queen Street, a stylish entire home perfectly placed for a city break or a relaxed staycation. Designed for up to four guests, this bright and airy flat offers two comfortable bedrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, and a spacious living area where you can unwind after a day of exploring the city. At a nightly rate of £185, you’ll enjoy a premium experience while staying within a competitive price point – just 6% above the local median. 

The property has earned a solid 4.58 rating from 401 reviews, reflecting consistent guest satisfaction. Although the host, Claire, is new to Airbnb, the home’s high‑quality furnishings and thoughtful layout make it a compelling choice for families, couples, or small groups seeking convenience and comfort. 

Located steps from the bustling heart of the city, you’ll have easy access to top restaurants, cultural attractions, and public transport. Whether you’re planning a short city escape or a longer stay, this Queen Street flat provides a welcoming base with all the essentials you need for a memorable visit. Book now to secure your stay and experience the best of city living in a modern, well‑appointed setting.
top_amenity_gaps: Parking (dedicated spot or guaranteed free street parking)
Entertainment amenities (TV with streaming, board games, etc.)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, wide‑angle shot of the living room as the cover photo; it instantly showcases the space’s size and style, drawing guests in before they scroll through the rest of the gallery.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £185 is only +6% above the cohort median (£175) while occupancy is just 15.2% versus the market median 28.3% – price isn’t the issue, you need to drive bookings.
The current title (47 chars) lacks SEO focus and clear differentiators; a sharper, keyword‑rich title under 50 chars will improve search visibility.
No amenities are listed, missing high‑value categories like Outdoor, Parking and Entertainment that travelers actively seek.
analysis.outreach_hook: With 76 open nights left in the next 90 days, you’re leaving roughly £14,060 of potential revenue on the table at your current £185 rate.
